title: Behavior-Influenced Lifecycle Governance Minimal Schema
description: Minimal governance profile scaffold for behavior-influenced object lifecycle records. This schema defines an interoperable core record shape and is intentionally not a complete lifecycle governance standard.
$comment: This scaffold preserves extensibility for profile-specific governance semantics and review workflows.

object_id.description: Stable identifier for the governed object.

evidence_refs.description: References to audit, provenance, or policy evidence relevant to lifecycle review.

policy_flags.description: Policy-visible flags associated with the current lifecycle record.

remediation_status.description: Current remediation review outcome within the lifecycle process.

last_reviewed_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent lifecycle review.
